pages.name: Mindrake Bulb
pages.text: Entities must be inside the central $(item)Cobweb$().

pages.title: Mutation Details
pages.text: Entities:$(br)$(8)>$() 1 Creeper$(br)$(8)>$() 1 $(l:creatures/mandrake)Mandrake$(/l)$(p)Notes:$(br)One $(l:herbology/grassper)Grassper$(/l) needs to hold a $(l:artifacts/misc/attuned_stone#charged)Charged Attuned Stone$(/l), one a $(l:)Focused Will$() and the other two $(l:artifacts/misc/mutandis#extremis)Mutandis Extremis$(/l)$(p)$(l:)Mandrake$(/l) crops must be fully mature.
